description_long: This rifle features a streamlined, angular body with a fixed stock and a prominent, straight barrel extending from the receiver. The magazine is a detachable box type, inserted at an angle beneath the receiver, and the trigger guard is clearly defined. The surface appears to be matte and dark, likely finished in a non-reflective coating for tactical use. The rifle lacks visible advanced optics, instead featuring simple iron sights integrated into the top of the receiver and barrel. The muzzle is plain, with no visible attachments such as a suppressor or flash hider. The overall design suggests a utilitarian, modern firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A matte, angular rifle with a fixed stock, detachable box magazine, and iron sights, finished in a dark, non-reflective color.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the fixed stock, angled magazine, and straight barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the stock, magazine, and barrel.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the slim profile of the stock and the back of the receiver.
